name: Green
description: A Tediore SMG with a fixed corrosive Maliwan barrel, giving it stronger elemental output and damage over time than a typical weapon of its rarity. Because its parts are locked in, it drops less often than its color suggests, but it can still carry you surprisingly well while leveling.
notes: Other Tediore SMGs in this set are Chaff for slag, Kindle for incendiary, and Spark for shock. It only appears at green rarity or higher and is a world drop from suitable loot sources.
